---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: wiggertdehaan
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does the current behaviour not work for you?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other approaches? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples from other tools, or extra context here.
